title: The Kozuki Retainers Reveal the Truth
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Tsuru, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Zoro as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kinemon explains the Kozuki tragedy, the twenty-year leap, and the mission to overthrow Kaido and Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The decisive battle will occur at the demon island, Onigashima.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The strategy meeting begins at the ruins of open castle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is the headquarters of Kaido and his beasts pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: An island...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do we have to sail to that place, even though we're already in the Wano country?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed! We possess a ship that can be used for this mission.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the island is close enough to be seen from this country's shores.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we don't need a full-scale ship to get there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Someone who knows

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...our decisive battle will occur during the fire Festival. It is a grand festival that is celebrated annually by the residents of the capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They consider Kaido to be a wise King who protects this country.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will go to Onigashima to "Pay their respects"... however, that is nothing more than a facade!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The beasts pirates and the government officials will have a banquet on that night....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see! So we'll beat up those idiots while they're in a drunken stupor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And then we'll take down their Commander!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maybe O-Kiki will fall in love with me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Once she sees my gallant form-)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Instead of being in love with that perverted Samuel

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But, Sanji, she's super-duper strong.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No, no, you have mis- understood, Sanji-Dono!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I already have a proper wife!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kiku is only a like- minded ally....!!

dialogue.speaker: Tsuru
dialogue.text: O-TSURU is doing well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: 'You met her!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes.:) Without her even recognis- ing me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see... I'm glad she's all right. But I cannot reunite with her yet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why the hell is a married man like you so popular!? I'm so jealous!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're too loud.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right now! I have depicted that decisive day and place on this paper.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: symbolised by two fire birds on top of the Habu pit viper respectively!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and also the will of rebellion, the waning crescent moon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't worry, the citizens of the Wano Country will under- stand this message.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The two birds symbolise Twilight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For foreigners such as your- selves, that's the time between 5:30 and 6:00 PM.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must spread these cards out as quickly as possible...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to those who have the mark of a crescent moon on their left ankle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That mark is the will of rebellion! They are our Allies!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We do not know where exactly to find these people.... but...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have sent our fellow comrades to various places around this country,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In order to ensure these cards get to as many of our allies as possible.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Zorojuro-dono and usopachi-dono are currently stationed in the capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, then I guess Zoro hasn't been very useful.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On top of that... to ensure we don't get lost...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once we land on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I have sent franchise- Dono to work as an apprentice of the man who built kaidou's residence.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: his goal is to obtain the blueprints of that building....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: further- more, to make sure that we know the movements of Orochi's army...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 0-Robi- Dono is trying to get closer to Orochi...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My my masquerading as a Geisha and making him want her in his sitting room!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've heard that she's already made a reputation for herself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd love to see Robin- chan as a geisha...:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As for the rest of you, Brook-Dono's power will be quite use- full...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: in securing the food supplies in the capital.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huh? Is that so?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Nami- Dono's weather techniques are practically Ninjutsu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'll be a female Ninja, then!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With Sanji-Dono's culinary skills, we'll be able to draw in crowds of people and find those we are searching for!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Naml-san dressed as a kunoich!! (7)

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 58 dialogue beats. The Kozuki retainers reveal that Wano’s rebellion has been carried twenty years into the future.
